heading: Funds out of Contingent Expenses, Architect of the Capitol Appropriation
label: 1863 Funds out of Contingent Expenses, Architect of the Capitol Appropriation
text: Any expenditures required to implement the provisions of shall be paid from the appropriation “Contingent Expenses, Architect of the Capitol” and any funds appropriated under this head shall hereafter be available for such purpose.section 1818 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was classified to section 166e of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. L. 107–217, § 1116 Stat. 1062Aug. 21, 2002
